stemHtml: An aircraft on an IFR flight in IMC experiences a total radio communication failure. If possible, when should it land?

options.a: Within 30 minutes of the ETA or the last acknowledged expected approach time, whichever comes later.
options.b: Within 15 minutes after crossing the designated navigation fix from which a standard instrument approach can be made.
options.c: Within 15 minutes of the ETA stated in the current IFR flight plan, or hold at a designated fix.
options.d: Within 10 minutes of the ETA or the last acknowledged expected approach time, whichever comes later.
